subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Abhá Beauty! Give thanks unto God that thou hast been enabled to render a service which is a testimony to the servitude of His Holiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب جمال ابهی شکر کن خدا را که موید بخدمتی گردیدی که برهان عبودیت حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement
